correct_text_en: Vaccines are rigorously tested and do not affect fertility.
HIV is caused by a virus transmitted through fluids.
correct_text_lg: HIV ereetera omukutu gwa HIV, si obulogo.
Ebimera bisobola okuyamba, naye tebikomya akawuka.

correct_text_en: Skilled health facility deliveries are safer.
correct_text_lg: Okuzaala mu ddwaliro kusinga okukuuma omukazi n'omwana.

correct_text_en: High temperatures don't kill the virus inside the body and can cause burns.
correct_text_lg: Okunywa ebyokulya ebyokya tekutuuka mu mawuggwe gye kawangaalira era kiyinza okwosa munda.

correct_text_en: Malaria is caused by mosquito bites, not fruit.
correct_text_lg: Okulya emmiyembe tekuleta malaria. Malaria ereetebwa nsiri.

correct_text_en: Ebola spreads through direct contact with body fluids.
correct_text_lg: Ebola esaasaanyizibwa mu kukwata ku mazzi g'omubiri, si mu mpewo.

correct_text_en: Garlic does not provide protection against malaria.
Vaccines do not interact with or change your DNA.
Plumpy'nut is a life-saving therapeutic food for malnutrition.
correct_text_lg: Plumpy'nut ddagala lya kulya eri abaana abanafu.

correct_text_en: Cholera is preventable and treatable with rehydration.

myth_text_en: Antenatal care is only for sick women.
correct_text_en: ANC is vital for all pregnant women for monitoring and health.
correct_text_lg: Okukebera nga oli lubuto kyamugaso nnyo eri buli mukazi.

myth_text_en: A secret cure for HIV exists.
correct_text_en: No cure exists yet, but ARVs allow for a healthy life.
correct_text_lg: Tewali ddagala lya HIV liwonya, naye waliwo eddagala erikuuma obulamu.

correct_text_en: Masks are safe and do not impact oxygen levels.

myth_text_en: Syphilis can be cured with lemon juice.
correct_text_en: Syphilis requires antibiotic treatment from a health facility. Lemon juice is ineffective.
correct_text_lg: Syphilis ewoneka n'eddagala ery'ekikugu (antibiotics) okuva mu ddwaliro. Amazzi g'ennimu tegawonya.

myth_text_en: You can tell if someone has an STD just by looking at them.
correct_text_en: Many STDs have no visible symptoms; only a medical test can confirm infection.
correct_text_lg: Endwadde z'ekikaba nnyingi teziraako bubonero bwangu kulaba; kukebera mu ddwaliro kwekukakasa.

correct_text_en: Washing does not prevent STDs; correct use of condoms and abstinence are effective methods.
correct_text_lg: Okunaaba mu kifo ky'ekyama luvanyuma lw'okwegatta tekuziyiza ndwadde z'ekikaba.
